title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 170.340 - Books of religious nature may be used, when
text:
170.340.  Books of religious nature may be used, when. — Books of a religious nature may be used in the classroom as part of instruction in elective courses in literature and history, as long as such books are not used in a manner so as to violate the Establishment Clause of the First Amendment to the United States Constitution.
(L. 2013 S.B. 17)
